bioprojects.title: Aspergillus fumigatus strain:W72310 Genome sequencing

description.comment: A. fumigatus strain W72310 (W7) represents a novel murine model of Allergic Broncho-pulmonary Aspergillosis (ABPA). W72310 shows resistance to murine bone marrow derived macrophage-induced killing, and increased persistence in the murine lung. Persistence of W72310 in sensitized murine lungs is associated with increased eosinophilia, serum IgE, mucus, and airway damage.
description.title: Pathogen: clinical or host-associated sample from Aspergillus fumigatus clinical isolate W7

description.title: Aspergillus fumigatus UD1 Standard Draft

assembly_info.comments:
URL -- http://genome.jgi.doe.gov/AspfumUD1_1
JGI Project ID: 1428899
The DNA was provided by Ross Klauer (rklauer@udel.edu)
The strain is available from Ross Klauer
Contacts: Mark Blenner (blenner@udel.edu)
Kevin Solomon (kvs@udel.edu)
Ross R. Klauer (rklauer@udel.edu)
Assembly and annotation done by JGI.
The JGI and collaborators endorse the principles for the distribution and use of large scale sequencing data adopted by the larger genome sequencing community and urge users of this data to follow them. It is our intention to publish the work of this project in a timely fashion and we welcome collaborative interaction on the project and analysis.
